name: boss-aios
description: IR Custom AIOS v2 — Brain-agnostic, voice-first AI Operating System

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core -w packages/brain -w packages/connectors -w packages/voice -w packages/healing -w packages/learning -w packages/backup -w packages/confidence -w apps/api -w apps/web -w apps/worker --if-present
